name: Community Fund of North Miami Dade
description_short: Community Fund of North Miami Dade is a non-profit organization offering free financial counseling and assistance to residents in the North Miami Dade area.
description_long:
Community Fund of North Miami Dade (CFNMD) is a non-profit organization serving the North Miami Dade community. Based on their website contact information and service offerings, they position themselves as a free-help resource for residents seeking financial guidance and support. The organization maintains a physical office in Opa-locka, Florida, and provides multiple channels for community members to connect with their services.

The organization offers financial counseling and advisory services to help residents navigate financial challenges. They actively encourage appointments and consultations through their website, indicating a commitment to personalized assistance. Their email address (smallbiz@cfnmd.org) suggests they may have particular expertise or focus areas related to small business or entrepreneurial support alongside general financial counseling.

CFNMD distinguishes itself through its local, community-based approach. Rather than operating as a national service provider, they are specifically focused on serving the North Miami Dade region, allowing them to understand local economic conditions and community needs. Their non-profit structure indicates they operate without profit motive, positioning them as a resource dedicated to community benefit rather than revenue generation.

Limitations include the minimal information available on their website about specific service offerings, certification status, or the scope of their counseling capabilities. Prospective clients cannot determine from the website alone whether they are HUD-approved housing counselors, NFCC-certified, or what specific financial issues they address. The lack of detailed service descriptions or eligibility information may require direct contact before understanding whether CFNMD can address individual financial needs.
pros: Free counseling services—no fees for financial advice
Local non-profit focused specifically on North Miami Dade community
Dedicated small business support email channel (smallbiz@cfnmd.org)
Direct appointment booking available on website
Physical office location provides in-person access
Non-profit structure ensures no profit motive in recommendations
Multiple contact methods (phone, email, appointment form)
cons: Website provides no details on specific certifications (HUD, NFCC, etc.) or credentials
No information about service scope, eligibility requirements, or what financial issues they address
Minimal online presence limits ability to research services before contacting
No service descriptions, FAQs, or educational resources on website
Limited geographic service area (North Miami Dade only)
best_for: North Miami Dade residents seeking free financial counseling
Small business owners in the local area needing advisory support
Low-income community members without resources for paid financial advice
diagnosis: CFNMD is best for North Miami Dade residents seeking free, local financial counseling from a community-based non-profit. The main caveat is that the website lacks sufficient detail about specific services, certifications, and capabilities—direct contact is necessary to determine if they can address your particular financial needs.
